mapper.select: SELECT id, indicator_name as indicatorName, category, weight, max_score as maxScore, create_time as createTime FROM info_indicator WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY category, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO info_indicator (indicator_name, category, weight, max_score, create_time, del_flag) VALUES (#{indicatorName}, #{category}, #{weight}, #{maxScore}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id, indicator_name as indicatorName, category, weight, max_score as maxScore FROM info_indicator WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE info_indicator SET del_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
